verification_gate: cargo build/test/fmt/clippy plus cargo audit plus rusty-idd merge-tools verify green; rusty-idd spec status runs; render and deploy --check drift gates pass.
proof_summary: Built rusty-idd-unified (cargo build --workspace exit 0; rusty-idd CLI binary produced at target/debug/rusty-idd). Two of the drift gates PASS: `rusty-idd render --check` (4 adapters in sync) and `rusty-idd deploy --check` (target . in sync, 4 vendors). The remaining gate elements are RED and are root-caused below (all in source/deps outside this lane's target/ ownership, and cannot be committed here): (1) `cargo fmt --all --check` fails on unformatted source in crates/core/src/planner.rs, crates/core/src/validation.rs, crates/knowledge/src/lib.rs, crates/core/tests/*.rs, plus envctl path-dep files; (2) `cargo test --workspace` fails 9 tests in crates/external/codegraph-parser with a tree-sitter ABI mismatch (LanguageError { version: 15 } from parser.set_language with tree_sitter_rust) -- the vendored tree-sitter-rust grammar ABI does not match the linked tree-sitter runtime; (3) `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` fails on crates/core/src/cli.rs:241 (collapsible_if); (4) `cargo audit` is NOT installed on this host (`cargo audit --version` -> `no such command: audit`); (5) `rusty-idd merge-tools verify` fails: foreign package manifest outside allowed surfaces: spike/ruvocal-mcp-bridge/package.json; (6) `rusty-idd spec status <change>` fails for EVERY change with `failed to parse schema: artifacts[0]: duplicate field template` -- the embedded default schema at intent-driven-template/openspec/schemas/intent-driven/schema.yaml has DUPLICATE `template:` keys in every artifact block (lines 8/9, 47/48, 127/128, 187/190, 246/247), which serde_norway rejects; the `template` field is unused by code (no `.template` reads in crates/spec or crates/cli), so the fix is to delete one of each duplicate pair.

blockers.detail: Unformatted source: crates/core/src/planner.rs:497,547; crates/core/src/validation.rs:667; crates/core/tests/smoke.rs:69,82; crates/core/tests/template_agent_surface.rs:151; crates/knowledge/src/lib.rs (multiple, e.g. 3,3125,3520,3724,5944,6103); plus path-dep envctl/crates/engine/{src/db_index.rs:213,src/db_watch.rs:188,tests/db_parity.rs:14}. Fix = run `cargo fmt --all` (touches source outside this lane's target/ ownership; needs commit-authorized session).
blockers.owner_action: Run cargo fmt --all in a commit-authorized session covering rusty-idd-unified (and the envctl path-dep).

blockers.detail: crates/external/codegraph-parser: 9 tests fail at complexity.rs:114 and tests/mod.rs:56 with LanguageError { version: 15 } — tree-sitter grammar ABI vs runtime mismatch. Fix = align tree-sitter / tree-sitter-rust versions in Cargo.lock (Cargo.toml dep bump).
blockers.owner_action: Bump/align tree-sitter and tree-sitter-rust to compatible ABI versions; re-run cargo test -p codegraph-parser.

blockers.detail: crates/core/src/cli.rs:241 collapsible_if (nested `if let Some(value) = args.get(i+1) { if !value.starts_with("--") {...} }`). Fix = collapse to a single `if let ... && ...` or `let ... else`.
blockers.owner_action: Collapse the if at crates/core/src/cli.rs:241 (surgical source edit).

blockers.detail: cargo-audit is not installed (`cargo audit --version` -> error: no such command: `audit`). Gate names cargo audit explicitly.
blockers.owner_action: cargo install cargo-audit (or add to the nix toolchain), then run cargo audit.

blockers.detail: Fails: 'foreign package manifest outside allowed surfaces: spike/ruvocal-mcp-bridge/package.json'. A package.json under spike/ is outside the allowed surfaces the verify gate enforces.
blockers.owner_action: Either move/allowlist spike/ruvocal-mcp-bridge/package.json per the merge-tools allowed-surface policy, or remove the foreign manifest.

blockers.detail: Every change fails: 'failed to parse schema: artifacts[0]: duplicate field template'. Root cause: intent-driven-template/openspec/schemas/intent-driven/schema.yaml has two `template:` keys per artifact (lines 8/9, 47/48, 127/128, 187/190, 246/247); serde_norway (Schema/Artifact derive with a single `template` field) rejects duplicate mapping keys. The field is never read in code. Fix = delete one line of each duplicate pair (also mirrored in imports/handoff/... and third_party/upstream/... copies).
blockers.owner_action: Remove the duplicate `template:` line in each artifact of the schema.yaml (surgical source edit); re-run rusty-idd spec status.
